🚀 Hiring: Emergent AI Developer (Full-Time | Remote | 3-Month Contract)

We are looking for a full-time Emergent AI Developer for a 3-month remote contract to work on high-impact AI initiatives. If you have hands-on experience with cutting-edge AI technologies and can contribute immediately, this role is for you.

🔹 Role: Emergent AI Developer
🔹 Engagement: Full-Time Contract (3 Months)
🔹 Location: 100% Remote
🔹 Start: Immediate 

💡 Key Responsibilities:
Design and build AI-driven solutions using LLMs, agent-based systems, and emerging AI frameworks
Develop, test, and deploy scalable AI models and workflows
Integrate AI capabilities into existing products/platforms
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to convert business requirements into AI solutions
Ensure performance optimization and system reliability

🛠️ Required Skills:
Strong experience in AI/ML development
Hands-on with LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI agents
Proficiency in Python and AI/ML libraries
Experience with APIs, cloud platforms, and integrations
Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment

⭐ Good to Have:
Experience in Generative AI use cases
Knowledge of vector databases, RAG pipelines, or autonomous agents
Prior experience in remote/full-time contract roles

📩 Interested candidates can DM or share their profile at: pbhandari@analyticsfoxsoftwares.com

Nandini Pilla

MBA Graduate -HR & Finance | HR Intern at CentoTech Services | IT & Non-IT Recruiter

🚀 We’re Hiring: Enterprise AI  (Remote | Open for freelance)
Looking to work on cutting-edge AI / LLM projects across industries? We’re building a small, high-impact team of AI experts to design and deploy production-grade AI solutions.

👥 Roles: Senior Lead (7+ yrs) & Mid-Level Engineers (3–7 yrs)
🌍 Location: Fully Remote
🕰️Shift: US timings- 6pm to 1am  
📍Company Location -Hyderabad

🤖 What You’ll Work On:
✔ Build LLM-powered applications (RAG, AI agents, chatbots)
✔ Develop & optimize ML pipelines & model workflows
✔ Design scalable AI infrastructure & MLOps systems
✔ Integrate with OpenAI, Anthropic & open-source LLMs
✔ Deploy using Docker, Kubernetes & cloud platforms
✔ Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into AI solutions
✔ Establish best practices in prompt engineering & model evaluation

🛠 Core Tech Stack:
🔹 Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
🔹 LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face
🔹 AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock), GCP (Vertex AI), Azure
🔹 Vector DBs (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector), PostgreSQL, Redis
🔹 CI/CD, Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker

⭐ Ideal Candidates:
• Experience building enterprise AI/ML systems in production
• Strong understanding of LLMs, RAG, embeddings & vector search
• Hands-on with cloud-native AI & MLOps
• Ability to work in fast-paced, cross-functional environments

📩 Interested candidates or referrals—please share profiles!
nandini.pilla@centotech.com
